violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The bottom shelf of the stainless steal tables were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Sliced Deli Meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Reduced oxygen packed imitation crab meat was observed thawing in the walk in cooler in a intact reduced oxygen package. Reduced oxygen packed fish product must be removed from package before thawing. Temperature of item was 40 degrees Fahrenheit. Item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. On the 1 door stand up, the chest freezer, and the walk in cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the at the three bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
The hand sink in the kitchen was observed in poor condition, hot water knob was observed loose. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

Wood is used in the construction of shelving/counter tops in the front and back prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. -Establishment shall not prepare foods on the back woodened counter until counter has been replaced with materials that are smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 09/13/23. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 09/08/23. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. *This violation has not exceeded the original correction date of 09/08/23. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

The floor tiles in the front prep area, back prep area, and floors in the walk-in cooler area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 11/30/23. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. -Staff resetted the sanitizer solution during this inspection and the sanitizer observed at 50-100ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

(Chemical) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. -Staff removed the can of chemical from the food-contact surfaces during this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken were observed placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and covered. Chicken observed at 75-85 degrees F. Per interview of staff, the chickens were prepared 1 hour prior to this inspection. -Proper cooling methods reviewed. Staff removed the covers and placed the chicken in the walk-in cooler to allow for rapid cooling. -Establishment shall keep a cooling food temperature log for foods in the cooling process. -Cooling food temperature log shall be completed and provided to Inspector upon the next re-inspection date. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the back prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the prep unit and chest freezer observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath the stove have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The floor tiles in the in the front prep area, floor tiles in the back prep area, and floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
